extortion.description: fgf.edu.br zoominfo.com/c/fgf/1128423083 UNIGRANDE is a higher education institution that offers a wide range of undergraduate programs including Bachelor's and Technological degrees, with courses available in both virtual and face-to-face modalities. The institution aims to provide educational opportunities for students and supports them through various admission processes such as online assessments and ENEM scores. Targeting prospective students, UNIGRANDE facilitates access to quality
